description_long: This armchair features a contemporary design with a warm brown leather seat and back cushion, both generously padded for comfort. The frame is constructed from light-colored wood, forming a rounded, open structure that wraps around the seat and back. Black cord or rope is intricately woven between the wooden frame elements, creating a visually striking and supportive enclosure on the sides and back. The armrests are smooth, rounded, and made of the same light wood as the legs, which are slender and slightly tapered. The overall aesthetic is modern yet inviting, blending natural materials with a touch of industrial flair. This armchair would be well-suited for urban parks, outdoor cafes, or stylish public seating areas.
description: A modern armchair with brown leather cushions, a light wood frame, and black woven cord sides and back, offering a stylish and comfortable seating option.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plush brown leather seat and back cushion, framed by light wood armrests and visible black cord sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness of the cushions, the rounded wooden armrest, and the vertical black cord weaving.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the curved wooden frame and the dense black cord weaving enclosing the back of the chair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the seat and back cushion, armrest, and woven cord structure.
attribute_armrest_design: rounded light wood, integrated with frame, smooth finish
attribute_backrest_style: medium height, slightly reclined, padded leather cushion, enclosed by curved wood and woven cord
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid brown leather with subtle natural texture
